title: dacryodes multijuga
intro: Dacryodes multijuga, also known as the butter tree or white butter tree, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. This tree is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dacryodes multijuga include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including extracts and oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
